_comment: Optional Protection panel. Copy to ~/.config/server-monitor/protection.json and fill in your machine's real invariants. Each check runs an argv (via a login shell, positionally): exit 0 = OK, nonzero = AT RISK. An optional 'repair' argv re-arms a failing invariant when you click Repair. 'note' is an optional hint shown when the check fails. The app only runs the argv and reads exit codes — it stores no host names or tool specifics, so this real file is never committed.

checks.label: VPN control binary present
checks.note: reinstall the VPN client if missing
